scripts.build:web: mkdir -p docs && touch docs/.nojekyll && cp -r src/web/* docs/ 2>/dev/null || true && node --input-type=commonjs -p "var p=require('./package.json');['name','version','description'].map(function(k){return 'export const '+k+' = '+JSON.stringify(p[k])+';'}).join('\n')" > docs/lib-meta.js
scripts.test:behaviour: npm run build:web && npx playwright test --config playwright.config.js
scripts.start: npm run build:web && npx serve docs
